speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: Is ’t possible the spells of France should juggle

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: Men into such strange mysteries?

speaker: SANDS
text: New customs,

speaker: SANDS
text: Though they be never so ridiculous—

speaker: SANDS
text: Nay, let ’em be unmanly—yet are followed.

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: As far as I see, all the good our English

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: Have got by the late voyage is but merely

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: A fit or two o’ th’ face; but they are shrewd ones,

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: For when they hold ’em, you would swear directly

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: Their very noses had been counselors

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: To Pepin or Clotharius, they keep state so.

speaker: SANDS
text: They have all new legs and lame ones; one would take it,

speaker: SANDS
text: That never see ’em pace before, the spavin

speaker: SANDS
text: Or springhalt reigned among ’em.

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: Death! My lord,

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: Their clothes are after such a pagan cut to ’t,

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: That, sure, they’ve worn out Christendom.

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: How now?

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: What news, Sir Thomas Lovell?

speaker: LOVELL
text: Faith, my lord,

speaker: LOVELL
text: I hear of none but the new proclamation

speaker: LOVELL
text: That’s clapped upon the court gate.

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: What is ’t for?

speaker: LOVELL
text: The reformation of our traveled gallants

speaker: LOVELL
text: That fill the court with quarrels, talk, and tailors.

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: I’m glad ’tis there; now I would pray our monsieurs

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: To think an English courtier may be wise

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: And never see the Louvre.

speaker: LOVELL
text: They must either—

speaker: LOVELL
text: For so run the conditions—leave those remnants

speaker: LOVELL
text: Of fool and feather that they got in France,

speaker: LOVELL
text: With all their honorable points of ignorance

speaker: LOVELL
text: Pertaining thereunto, as fights and fireworks,

speaker: LOVELL
text: Abusing better men than they can be

speaker: LOVELL
text: Out of a foreign wisdom, renouncing clean

speaker: LOVELL
text: The faith they have in tennis and tall stockings,

speaker: LOVELL
text: Short blistered breeches, and those types of travel,

speaker: LOVELL
text: And understand again like honest men,

speaker: LOVELL
text: Or pack to their old playfellows. There, I take it,

speaker: LOVELL
text: They may cum privilegio “oui” away

speaker: LOVELL
text: The lag end of their lewdness and be laughed at.

speaker: SANDS
text: ’Tis time to give ’em physic, their diseases

speaker: SANDS
text: Are grown so catching.

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: What a loss our ladies

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: Will have of these trim vanities!

speaker: LOVELL
text: Ay, marry,

speaker: LOVELL
text: There will be woe indeed, lords. The sly whoresons

speaker: LOVELL
text: Have got a speeding trick to lay down ladies.

speaker: LOVELL
text: A French song and a fiddle has no fellow.

speaker: SANDS
text: The devil fiddle ’em! I am glad they are going,

speaker: SANDS
text: For sure there’s no converting of ’em. Now

speaker: SANDS
text: An honest country lord, as I am, beaten

speaker: SANDS
text: A long time out of play, may bring his plainsong,

speaker: SANDS
text: And have an hour of hearing, and, by ’r Lady,

speaker: SANDS
text: Held current music too.

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: Well said, Lord Sands.

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: Your colt’s tooth is not cast yet?

speaker: SANDS
text: No, my lord,

speaker: SANDS
text: Nor shall not while I have a stump.

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: Sir Thomas,

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: Whither were you a-going?

speaker: LOVELL
text: To the Cardinal’s.

speaker: LOVELL
text: Your Lordship is a guest too.

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: O, ’tis true.

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: This night he makes a supper, and a great one,

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: To many lords and ladies. There will be

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: The beauty of this kingdom, I’ll assure you.

speaker: LOVELL
text: That churchman bears a bounteous mind indeed,

speaker: LOVELL
text: A hand as fruitful as the land that feeds us.

speaker: LOVELL
text: His dews fall everywhere.

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: No doubt he’s noble;

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: He had a black mouth that said other of him.

speaker: SANDS
text: He may, my lord. ’Has wherewithal. In him,

speaker: SANDS
text: Sparing would show a worse sin than ill doctrine.

speaker: SANDS
text: Men of his way should be most liberal;

speaker: SANDS
text: They are set here for examples.

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: True, they are so,

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: But few now give so great ones. My barge stays.

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: Your Lordship shall along.—Come, good Sir Thomas,

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: We shall be late else, which I would not be,

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: For I was spoke to, with Sir Henry Guilford

speaker: CHAMBERLAIN
text: This night to be comptrollers.

speaker: SANDS
text: I am your Lordship’s.
